allow: Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\(''zod''\); const s = z.object\({ level: z.number\(\).int\(\).min\(1\).max\(5\) }\); console.log\(s.parse\({ level: 3 }\)\); try { s.parse\({ level: 0 }\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''rejected 0:'', e.issues[0].message\) }")

Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\(''zod''\); const s = z.string\(\).url\(\); try { s.parse\(''https://www.linkedin.com/in/lauri-tuumi-4898601a3/''\); console.log\(''url ok''\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''url failed:'', e.message\) }")

Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\(''zod''\); const langSchema = z.enum\([''fi'',''en'']\); const s = z.object\({ fi: z.array\(z.string\(\)\), en: z.array\(z.string\(\)\) }\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s.parse\({ fi: [''a''], en: [''b''] }\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\(''zod''\); const s = z.url\(\); console.log\(s.parse\(''https://www.linkedin.com/in/lauri/''\)\); try { s.parse\(''not-a-url''\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''rejected:'', e.issues[0].message\) }")
Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\(''zod''\); const s = z.url\(\).refine\(u => u.includes\(''linkedin.com/in/''\)\); console.log\(s.parse\(''https://www.linkedin.com/in/lauri/''\)\)")
